package.name: spacemouse_teleop
package.description: Translate the 3Dconnexion SpaceMouse pose_node's absolute pose (/spacemouse/curr_pose) into an absolute target pose for ikt_pose_commander (~/target_pose), anchored to the robot's current end-effector so jogging starts jump-free. The single adapter between the robot-agnostic SpaceMouse package and the device-agnostic pose commander.
